message:
feat(web): Add staff picks and featured content system

- Create featured-store.ts with in-memory store for staff picks, featured content, and spotlights
- Add public GET /api/featured endpoint with filtering by type, resource type, category
- Add admin CRUD endpoints at /api/admin/featured (GET, POST, PATCH, DELETE)
- Create admin featured content manager UI at /admin/featured
- Add StaffPickBadge, FeaturedBadge, SpotlightBadge components

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,7 @@
+export {
+  FeaturedBadge,
+  StaffPickBadge,
+  FeaturedContentBadge,
+  SpotlightBadge,
+  ConditionalFeaturedBadge,
+} from "./staff-pick-badge";
